name: Endless Runner Starter
description: An auto-scrolling endless runner with procedural obstacle generation, lane switching or jumping mechanics, increasing difficulty, score/distance tracking, and death/restart flow. Includes a CharacterBody2D player with jump/slide, obstacle spawner with randomized patterns, parallax scrolling background, and a game over screen with high score.

projectStructure.project.godot: Project configuration — display: 1280x720, physics: 2D default gravity 980, input map with jump/slide/move_up/move_down actions

scenes/.main.tscn: Node2D root — manages game state (menu, playing, game_over), contains player, obstacle_spawner, ground, background, and UI as children
scenes/.player.tscn: CharacterBody2D — Sprite2D with run animation, CollisionShape2D (capsule), AnimationPlayer (run/jump/slide/hit states), fixed X position with Y movement for jumping
scenes/.obstacles/obstacle_base.tscn: Area2D — CollisionShape2D, Sprite2D, auto-scroll movement leftward, queue_free when off-screen
scenes/.obstacles/obstacle_low.tscn: Inherits obstacle_base — ground-level obstacle (jump to avoid)
scenes/.obstacles/obstacle_high.tscn: Inherits obstacle_base — aerial obstacle (slide to avoid)
scenes/.obstacles/obstacle_gap.tscn: Inherits obstacle_base — gap in ground (jump across)
scenes/.collectibles/coin_line.tscn: Node2D — row of Area2D coins at configurable height, collected on body overlap
scenes/.environment/ground.tscn: StaticBody2D — infinite scrolling ground using two Sprite2D segments that swap positions
scenes/.environment/parallax_bg.tscn: ParallaxBackground — 3 ParallaxLayers (sky static, clouds slow, buildings medium) for depth effect
scenes/.ui/hud.tscn: CanvasLayer — distance Label (top-center), coin count (top-right), current multiplier indicator
scenes/.ui/game_over.tscn: CanvasLayer — 'Game Over' title, final distance, high score comparison, coins earned, restart Button, menu Button

scripts/.player.gd: extends CharacterBody2D — gravity applied in _physics_process, jump on input (only if on_floor), slide activates crouch collision shape and animation, hit detection via Area2D signal triggers death sequence with brief invincibility flash
scripts/.obstacle_spawner.gd: extends Node — spawn_timer with decreasing interval (difficulty ramp), obstacle_pool of packed scenes, pattern_sequences array for curated obstacle combinations, random selection with minimum spacing rules, speed increases over time
scripts/.ground_scroller.gd: extends Node2D — two ground segments scrolling left at game_speed, repositions segment to right edge when it exits left viewport
scripts/.game_manager.gd: extends Node (autoload) — game_speed (increases over time), distance_traveled, coin_count, is_playing state, high_score persistence with ConfigFile, difficulty_curve formula based on distance
scripts/.coin.gd: extends Area2D — on_body_entered adds to game_manager coin_count, plays collect animation, queue_free

assets/.placeholder_runner.png: 32x48 character spritesheet (run cycle 6 frames, jump 2 frames, slide 2 frames, hit 1 frame)

preBuiltMechanics: Procedural obstacle spawning with pattern variety
customizationPoints: Difficulty curve (speed ramp rate, spawn intervals)
Lane-based movement (3 lanes) vs free jumping
Add boss encounters at distance milestones
examplePrompts: Make a Temple Run style endless runner
Create a game where a dinosaur jumps over cacti
Build an infinite running game with obstacles
Design a runner game where difficulty increases over time
